title: Second-derivative UV Spectroscopy
author: Moriah Beck
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q7qdzmw

steps.title: Determine protein concentrations either using absorption...
steps.instruction: Determine protein concentrations either using absorption coefficients (Abs @ 280 nm) or using BCA, Bradford, etc. colorimetric assays. Proteins should be used at concentration where A 280 ~ 0.2

steps.title: Copy UV scan data from instrument...
steps.instruction: Copy UV scan data from instrument into a Prism file with columns for wavelength and absorbance values. Analyze>XY Analysis> Smooth, Differentiate, or Integrate Curve>Create Second Derivative of Curve>smooth or not? Prism Analyze >XY Analysis > Smooth, Differentiate, or Integrate Curve >Create Second Derivative of Curve >smooth or not? Prism
